name: Beef Teriyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice beef into 1/2 inch strips.
2. Arrange the sliced beef in a shallow casserole dish.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the soy sauce, white wine, minced garlic, and grated ginger.
4. Pour the marinade over the meat, covering it completely.
5. Cover the casserole dish and refrigerate for 2 hours.
6. Remove the beef from the refrigerator and broil for 1-1/2 minutes on each side.
7. Pour the remaining marinade into a saucepan.
8. Add cornstarch and cook over medium heat until the sauce thickens.
9. Stir in the Equal packets until dissolved.
10. Serve the sauce over the beef.
